title: Phase A · Commit D: Tests cleanup (delete v1.x tests + adapt v2 fixtures)
description: Clean up the test suite to match v1.x dead-code removals from TASK-001/002/003. 13 test files reference v1.x paths/concepts. Default action: **delete**, only adapt if v2 equivalent purpose exists. Likely delete-candidates by name: (1) `packages/server/src/services/rule-sync.test.ts` (v1 'rules sync protocol' — deprecated metaphor); (2) `packages/server/__tests__/tool-rule-freshness.test.ts` (v1 'rule freshness' — replaced by maturity/decay in rc.4 lint); (3) `packages/cli/__tests__/init-nondestructive.test.ts` (v1 semantic 'don't break existing .fabric/rules/'); (4) `packages/cli/__tests__/forensic-shadow-mirroring.test.ts` (if testing v1 forensic shadow over .fabric/rules/). Adapt-candidates: tests that exercise v2 schema/behavior but happen to reference old paths in fixtures — update fixtures to .fabric/knowledge/{type}/ paths.
estimated_time: 1-1.5h (portion of Phase A 4-6h budget); High complexity due to per-test triage decisions

files.change: Delete — tests v1 'rules sync protocol' which is a deprecated v1 metaphor with no v2 equivalent
Delete — tests v1 'rule freshness' concept; v2 replacement is maturity/decay lint shipping in rc.4
Delete — premise was 'don't break existing .fabric/rules/'; v2 layout makes this test irrelevant
If tests v1 forensic shadow over .fabric/rules/ → DELETE; if tests forensic shadow over source code only (path-agnostic) → ADAPT fixtures to remove .fabric/rules/ paths
Remove all assertions tied to .fabric/rules/ existence checks and INITIAL_TAXONOMY content checks (TASK-002 deleted those production lints; tests must follow)
Update fixtures to v2 .fabric/knowledge/{type}/ structure; remove INITIAL_TAXONOMY content seeding

Remove fixtures using deleted event types (rule_baseline_accepted, baseline_synced, legacy_client_path_present); update fixtures using renamed event types (rule_*→knowledge_*) — note: TASK-006 owns the schema rename, this task adapts test fixtures to consume the new schema

implementation: Run `grep -rln '\.fabric/rules\|INITIAL_TAXONOMY\|buildInitialTaxonomyMarkdown\|rule_baseline\|baseline_synced\|legacy_client_path_present' packages/cli/__tests__/ packages/server/__tests__/ packages/server/src/**/*.test.ts` to enumerate all hits — expect ~13 files
For each hit file, classify: (a) DELETE if test concept is v1-only with no v2 equivalent; (b) ADAPT if test concept survives in v2 but fixtures need updating
Delete the 4 named v1-concept test files (rule-sync, tool-rule-freshness, init-nondestructive, forensic-shadow-mirroring if confirmed v1)
Adapt doctor.test.ts: prune assertions matching deleted v1 lint checks
Adapt init-atomic.test.ts and other init/scan tests: replace .fabric/rules/ paths with .fabric/knowledge/{type}/, remove INITIAL_TAXONOMY seeding
Adapt schemas-roundtrip.test.ts: remove fixtures of deleted event types; rename fixtures of renamed event types
Run `pnpm test` across all packages — must exit 0
Re-run grep gate from convergence — must be empty

reference.pattern: Test cleanup mirroring source-code dead-code removal — delete-by-default, adapt-only-if-purpose-survives
reference.examples: Each delete must have a one-line rationale in commit message (Q4 documents per-file rationale already)

criteria: No matches for `\.fabric/rules` in `packages/**/__tests__/` or `packages/**/*.test.ts` (grep returns empty)
No matches for `INITIAL_TAXONOMY` in `packages/**/__tests__/` or `packages/**/*.test.ts` (grep returns empty)
No matches for `rule_baseline_accepted\|baseline_synced\|legacy_client_path_present` in `packages/**/*.test.ts` (grep returns empty)
Files do not exist: rule-sync.test.ts, tool-rule-freshness.test.ts, init-nondestructive.test.ts (all 3 by name verified absent)
Test count delta documented in commit message (e.g. '-4 test files deleted, 6 adapted')

scope_boundary: OUT OF SCOPE: production code changes (TASK-001/002/003 own those), schema rename event-type definitions (TASK-006 — this task only adapts CONSUMERS of the schema, not the schema source itself), new v2 lint test suite (rc.4). Note: TASK-006 will rename event types in packages/shared/src/schemas/event-ledger.ts; this task's schemas-roundtrip.test.ts adaptation may need a sequence-of-touches approach if TASK-006 lands first — coordinate by always running tests AFTER TASK-006 lands.

rationale.chosen_approach: Per-file triage with delete-by-default, adapt-only-if-purpose-survives, batched into a single 'tests cleanup' commit
alternatives_considered: Skip-and-leave (mark as .skip) v1 tests for later cleanup
Adapt all 13 tests rather than delete
decision_factors: v1 test premises are wrong in v2 (rule-sync, rule-freshness have no v2 analog)
Hard delete keeps test suite signal-to-noise high
rationale.tradeoffs: Loses test coverage temporarily for behaviors rc.4 will re-cover (e.g. rule freshness → maturity/decay) — acceptable because v1 tests would actively pass-on-wrong-premise in v2 layout

manual_checks: Run `pnpm test` — exit 0, no skipped tests
Spot-check git diff: confirm 4 deletions are full-file deletes (not skip), and adapted tests no longer reference .fabric/rules/
success_metrics: Net test count delta documented (delete count + adapt count)
unit: All preserved unit tests still pass
integration: init pipeline e2e tests still pass with v2 paths

risks.description: forensic-shadow-mirroring.test.ts classification (delete vs adapt) is uncertain without reading the test
risks.mitigation: Open the file first; if any assertion mentions .fabric/rules/ path → delete; if all assertions are path-agnostic → adapt fixtures only
risks.fallback: If unclear, default to delete (clean-slate preference); rc.4 forensic test suite can re-cover surviving-purpose

risks.description: schemas-roundtrip.test.ts depends on TASK-006 schema rename for fixture updates to compile
risks.mitigation: Run TASK-004 logically after TASK-006 if both touch shared/schemas — but per the dependency graph TASK-004 → TASK-005 → TASK-006, this means schemas-roundtrip adaptation in TASK-004 must use OLD event names, then TASK-006 will re-edit it
risks.fallback: Defer schemas-roundtrip.test.ts adaptation to TASK-006 commit instead of TASK-004 (smaller scope shift)

risks.description: Hidden v1 references in fixture .json files not caught by primary grep
risks.mitigation: Extend grep to fixtures: `grep -rln '\.fabric/rules' packages/**/__tests__/fixtures/` and `packages/**/test-fixtures/`
risks.fallback: Add fixture-path grep to the Day-1 gate
